name: ConvertX
compose:
name: slashnode-convertx
services:
  server:
    image: c4illin/convertx:v0.18.0
    container_name: convertx
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      HTTP_ALLOWED: 'true'
      ACCOUNT_REGISTRATION: 'true'
    volumes:
      - server_data-app:/app/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8386:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-app:
    name: slashnode-convertx_server_data-app
